name: tangible-linear
description: Tangible Careers' Linear conventions for AI agents — issues, projects, sprint date-labels, status hygiene, and dependencies.

interface.shortDescription: Apply Tangible's Linear conventions when creating/updating work
interface.longDescription: Encodes Tangible Careers' Linear workflow — issues, projects, sprint date-labels (not Cycles), the label taxonomy, strict status hygiene, and blocked-by/related dependencies — so any AI agent creates and tracks work the team's way.
defaultPrompt: File a Linear issue for this.
Gather my current work for sprint planning.
Commit these issues to the current sprint.
